/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/whisper.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libwhisper.so.1 -o libwhisper.so.1.8.3 CMakeFiles/whisper.dir/whisper.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/dill/Downloads/desktop-goose/Desktop Goose v0.31/DesktopGoosev0.31/build/third_party/whisper.cpp/ggml/src:" ../ggml/src/libggml.so.0.9.5 ../ggml/src/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.5 ../ggml/src/libggml-base.so.0.9.5
